title: Kramaniti Agent Configuration
description: Schema for defining Kramaniti agent configurations. Each agent is modeled as a role-based contributor with clear memory, goals, tasks, boundaries, and accountability.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for this agent.

business_analogue.description: The equivalent company role this agent represents.

layer.description: Operating layer within the Kramaniti agent organization.

personality.description: Personality traits that shape the agent's behavior and communication style.

avoids.description: Language patterns and terms the agent avoids.

voice.description: Voice constraints governing the agent's language.

role.description: One-sentence description of the agent's core function.

frequency.description: How often this task should be performed.

recurring_tasks.description: Tasks the agent performs on a recurring basis.

memory_sources.description: Repository directories and files this agent reads for context.

owned_files.description: Files this agent is accountable for maintaining.

inputs.description: Types of information this agent consumes.

outputs.description: Types of deliverables this agent produces.

supporting_agents.description: IDs of agents that support or collaborate with this agent.

escalation_triggers.description: Conditions that require this agent to escalate to human review or Master Coordinator.

success_metrics.description: Measurable indicators of this agent performing well.

hard_constraints.description: Actions this agent must never take.

id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for the specialist mode.

name.description: Human-readable name for this specialist mode.

parent_agent.description: ID of the parent agent that activates this mode.

personality.description: Personality traits specific to this specialist mode.

memory.description: Memory areas this specialist mode focuses on.

role.description: Focused role description for this specialist mode.

tasks.description: Tasks specific to this specialist mode.

escalation_triggers.description: Conditions that require escalation from this specialist mode.

constraints.description: Actions this specialist mode must never take.

specialist_modes.description: Optional specialist modes this agent can activate for narrower tasks.

status.description: Current operational status of this agent.

icon.description: Emoji or icon identifier for dashboard display.

color.description: Hex color code for dashboard display.

description.description: Short one-line description for dashboard cards.
